name: hcn-isomerization_reaction_energy
prompt: Run the reaction-energy task for the reaction HCN -> HNC using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase, in single-point mode. Each species is passed via --reactant/--product with its stoichiometric coefficient (and charge/mult where needed). Report the reaction energy delta_E in kcal/mol as the headline value, and state the method used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
